articles.title: New Mexico schools use Amira AI reading assessments amid accuracy and equity concerns
articles.description: New Mexico now requires K-2 students to use Amira AI for reading assessments, with Albuquerque teachers reporting both gains in literacy and worries about inaccurate scores, speech and accent bias and student frustration.
articles.content:
